speaker: JULIET
text: The clock struck nine when I did send the Nurse.

speaker: JULIET
text: In half an hour she promised to return.

speaker: JULIET
text: Perchance she cannot meet him. That’s not so.

speaker: JULIET
text: O, she is lame! Love’s heralds should be thoughts,

speaker: JULIET
text: Which ten times faster glides than the sun’s beams,

speaker: JULIET
text: Driving back shadows over louring hills.

speaker: JULIET
text: Therefore do nimble-pinioned doves draw Love,

speaker: JULIET
text: And therefore hath the wind-swift Cupid wings.

speaker: JULIET
text: Now is the sun upon the highmost hill

speaker: JULIET
text: Of this day’s journey, and from nine till twelve

speaker: JULIET
text: Is three long hours, yet she is not come.

speaker: JULIET
text: Had she affections and warm youthful blood,

speaker: JULIET
text: She would be as swift in motion as a ball;

speaker: JULIET
text: My words would bandy her to my sweet love,

speaker: JULIET
text: And his to me.

speaker: JULIET
text: But old folks, many feign as they were dead,

speaker: JULIET
text: Unwieldy, slow, heavy, and pale as lead.

speaker: JULIET
text: O God, she comes!—O, honey nurse, what news?

speaker: JULIET
text: Hast thou met with him? Send thy man away.

speaker: NURSE
text: Peter, stay at the gate.

speaker: JULIET
text: Now, good sweet nurse—O Lord, why lookest thou sad?

speaker: JULIET
text: Though news be sad, yet tell them merrily.

speaker: JULIET
text: If good, thou shamest the music of sweet news

speaker: JULIET
text: By playing it to me with so sour a face.

speaker: NURSE
text: I am aweary. Give me leave awhile.

speaker: NURSE
text: Fie, how my bones ache! What a jaunt have I!

speaker: JULIET
text: I would thou hadst my bones, and I thy news.

speaker: JULIET
text: Nay, come, I pray thee, speak. Good, good nurse, speak.

speaker: NURSE
text: Jesu, what haste! Can you not stay awhile?

speaker: NURSE
text: Do you not see that I am out of breath?

speaker: JULIET
text: How art thou out of breath, when thou hast breath

speaker: JULIET
text: To say to me that thou art out of breath?

speaker: JULIET
text: The excuse that thou dost make in this delay

speaker: JULIET
text: Is longer than the tale thou dost excuse.

speaker: JULIET
text: Is thy news good or bad? Answer to that.

speaker: JULIET
text: Say either, and I’ll stay the circumstance.

speaker: JULIET
text: Let me be satisfied; is ’t good or bad?

speaker: NURSE
text: Well, you have made a simple choice. You know

speaker: NURSE
text: not how to choose a man. Romeo? No, not he.

speaker: NURSE
text: Though his face be better than any man’s, yet his leg

speaker: NURSE
text: excels all men’s, and for a hand and a foot and a

speaker: NURSE
text: body, though they be not to be talked on, yet they

speaker: NURSE
text: are past compare. He is not the flower of courtesy,

speaker: NURSE
text: but I’ll warrant him as gentle as a lamb. Go thy

speaker: NURSE
text: ways, wench. Serve God. What, have you dined at

speaker: NURSE
text: home?

speaker: JULIET
text: No, no. But all this did I know before.

speaker: JULIET
text: What says he of our marriage? What of that?

speaker: NURSE
text: Lord, how my head aches! What a head have I!

speaker: NURSE
text: It beats as it would fall in twenty pieces.

speaker: NURSE
text: My back o’ t’ other side! Ah, my back, my back!

speaker: NURSE
text: Beshrew your heart for sending me about

speaker: NURSE
text: To catch my death with jaunting up and down.

speaker: JULIET
text: I’ faith, I am sorry that thou art not well.

speaker: JULIET
text: Sweet, sweet, sweet nurse, tell me, what says my love?

speaker: NURSE
text: Your love says, like an honest gentleman, and a

speaker: NURSE
text: courteous, and a kind, and a handsome, and, I

speaker: NURSE
text: warrant, a virtuous—Where is your mother?

speaker: JULIET
text: Where is my mother? Why, she is within.

speaker: JULIET
text: Where should she be? How oddly thou repliest:

speaker: JULIET
text: “Your love says, like an honest gentleman,

speaker: JULIET
text: Where is your mother?”

speaker: NURSE
text: O God’s lady dear,

speaker: NURSE
text: Are you so hot? Marry, come up, I trow.

speaker: NURSE
text: Is this the poultice for my aching bones?

speaker: NURSE
text: Henceforward do your messages yourself.

speaker: JULIET
text: Here’s such a coil. Come, what says Romeo?

speaker: NURSE
text: Have you got leave to go to shrift today?

speaker: JULIET
text: I have.

speaker: NURSE
text: Then hie you hence to Friar Lawrence’ cell.

speaker: NURSE
text: There stays a husband to make you a wife.

speaker: NURSE
text: Now comes the wanton blood up in your cheeks;

speaker: NURSE
text: They’ll be in scarlet straight at any news.

speaker: NURSE
text: Hie you to church. I must another way,

speaker: NURSE
text: To fetch a ladder by the which your love

speaker: NURSE
text: Must climb a bird’s nest soon when it is dark.

speaker: NURSE
text: I am the drudge and toil in your delight,

speaker: NURSE
text: But you shall bear the burden soon at night.

speaker: NURSE
text: Go. I’ll to dinner. Hie you to the cell.

speaker: JULIET
text: Hie to high fortune! Honest nurse, farewell.
